scope: zero-training coordinate-solver comparison on the unchanged two-pass coordinate checkpoint; no full-hybrid generation claim

solver_contract.coordinate_reverse_sde: full Brownian score drift plus translation-horizontal bridge noise
solver_contract.coordinate_probability_flow: one-half Brownian score drift with no continuous noise
solver_contract.lattice_probability_flow: deterministic VP DDIM transition from the same clean-state estimate
solver_contract.categorical_path: absorbing categorical reverse process remains stochastic and is not renamed an ODE
solver_contract.coordinate_chart: translation-horizontal universal-cover lift with graph geometry wrapping internally and wrap01 only at terminal decode
solver_contract.forbidden_stage_operation: no per-stage wrap01 because it reintroduces periodic-image branch switches

evaluation.latency_measurement: CUDA-synchronized full coordinate rollouts with initialization and host-to-device transfer excluded
evaluation.condition_order: forward on even batches and reversed on odd batches
evaluation.rationale: the only active two-pass checkpoint is coordinate-only; sampling untrained element and lattice heads would make composition and lattice non-inferiority scientifically uninterpretable

metrics.warning: composition and lattice identity are fixed controls, not evidence that their reverse samplers are qualified

decision_rule.retain_probability_flow: at least one probability-flow candidate at 25 or 50 NFE passes every frozen coordinate quality, finite-state, failure and latency check
decision_rule.retain_reverse_sde_only: neither probability-flow candidate passes, including if deterministic transport further contracts nearest-neighbour geometry
decision_rule.full_hybrid_follow_up: composition and lattice non-inferiority require a separately qualified jointly trained checkpoint; they cannot be inferred from this coordinate-only checkpoint
decision_rule.boundary: No optimizer step, new model, extra seed, tensor condition, H1b-H6, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT is authorized. The protocol is frozen but must remain unrun while sampling is paused.
